project_information.type.answer: Concept submittal – Olivio Grande RGBW pedestrian‑scale lighting for waterfront promenade, including pole-mounted and wall-mounted runs for dynamic scene setting and event lighting.

product_modifications.product_modificati.answer: Factory to pre-wire universal mount heads with 10 ft of extra 18/5 SJOW cable per fixture to simplify daisy-chaining between heads on multi-head pole assemblies.
Provide custom RAL 7016 Anthracite Grey top cap and hardware (fasteners, brackets) to better match existing site furnishings while keeping pole in standard BK finish for cost control.

Program DMX/RDM drivers at factory with default scenes: Scene 1 – static 3000K-equivalent warm white, Scene 2 – slow color rotation (10-minute cycle) with pastel tones only, Scene 3 – event mode with saturated colors limited to max 80% output for energy and glare management.

Include engraved stainless steel fixture labels on each luminaire whip indicating DMX address and universe (e.g., “U2-CH049–052”), attached within 6 in of fixture housing for ease of commissioning and maintenance.
